form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished last on April 15 over 450m at this track behind Devington beaten 9 lengths (25.92) in a Grade 5 H. Looks a strong winning hope.

form.formComment: Finished third last time (19.80) over 350m at Healesville. Drawn close to the inside. Must be included.

form.formComment: Last start finished eighth in a Grade 5 on April 18 over 525m at The Meadows behind Paw Nimbus, beaten 13 lengths (31.17). Will find this a little easier. Leading chance on best form.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh on April 15 over 450m at this track behind Croydon, beaten 14 lengths (25.97) in a Grade 4/5. Others have better credentials.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd over 460m at Geelong beaten 2.5 lengths (26.38) behind Obliviate in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 14. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

form.formComment: Could only manage sixth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when second (19.48) over 350m at Healesville. Drawn out wide and appears tested on latest effort.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 8 for the first time after finishing a 4 length sixth at Geelong (22.92) in a Grade 4/5. Has ability and should be around the money.
